response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering skills and leadership in scaling teams and systems, but his experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure is limited. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, frameworks) shows emerging relevance, but lacks direct production experience with multi-agent systems in regulated financial environments. The resume lacks clear evidence of fintech domain expertise, real-time credit systems, or compliance architecture.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and backend expertise with event-driven architectures
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and improving development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization in high-throughput environments
concerns: Limited direct experience with agentic AI systems in production environments
Minimal fintech-specific background (e.g., credit risk, real-time trading, regulatory compliance)
No clear evidence of designing model-agnostic AI architectures or handling financial data in regulated contexts
